name: BaseConvo_Her Guardian
_source: s;Felicity;I wonder if he's still here.
s;Felicity;In the exact same spot for so long{tgm}...|{c:e;Felicity;CloseEyes}{tgm}I'm sorry for taking so long, Aspis.
s;Aspis;[INITIATING BOOT SEQUENCE.]{br}[PLEASE HOLD.]|[ALL SYSTEMS ONLINE.]{br}[ASPIS VERSION 1.4.7 ACTIVATED.];TextSpeed=10
s;Felicity;It's just me, Aspis. I'm back.
s;Aspis;Lady Felicity? What has happened on the surface?|And why the strange clothes?
s;Felicity;Good to see you too, old friend.|{c:e;Felicity;NormalBlink,Smile}And boy, do we have a lot of catching up to do.{w} A centuries' worth, in fact.
s;Aspis;"C-Centuries"?! Please tell me everything, my lady!
s;Aspis;Still no luck in finding Lady Lenora, then...|I am so sorry, Lady Felicity.

s;Felicity;There's only so much we can do.|{c:e;Felicity;NormalBlink}I'm sorry you have to take up arms again, friend.|Especially since you have just woken up.{w}{c:music_clear}{c:m;Together We Ride}{c:e;Felicity;HalfCloseEyes} But we need you, Aspis.
s;Aspis;I understand, my lady. I hold no objections to this.|This is what I was created to do.
s;Felicity;Sometimes I wish it wasn't.|{c:e;Felicity;NormalBlink}Still, I am glad to have you here. And I'm sorry for being gone for so long.
s;Aspis;There is no need to apologize, Lady Felicity.|I will stay by your side for as long as you'll have me.
